info.description:
GitWeb's backend API for managing Git repositories and browsing the local filesystem.
This API provides endpoints for repository management, branch/commit operations, file management, and remote sync.
info.title: Gittyd API

get.description: Returns all device records without including token hashes. Requires Bearer auth.

delete.description: Revokes the device token. Returns 204 No Content on success.

post.description: Issues a device token for localhost connections after validating the master password. This is a simplified flow for the web frontend.
Validates the session and master password, then issues a new device token

400.description: invalid JSON or missing required fields

get.description: Returns the current pairing session information for QR code scanning
Browse a directory on the filesystem

post.description: Create a new Git repository or clone from URL
Import an existing repository from disk

get.description: Get details for a specific repository
List all branches for a repository

delete.description: Delete a branch from the repository

post.description: Create a new commit with staged changes

get.description: Get commit history for a repository
Get detailed information about a specific commit
Get the file tree for a repository at a specific path
Read the content of a file in a repository

put.description: Write content to a file in a repository

post.description: Force push current branch to remote

delete.description: Unstage a file from the index

get.description: Get working directory status (staged, modified, untracked files)

createdAt.description: Token creation time in RFC3339 format

lastUsedAt.description: Last time the token was used for authentication in RFC3339 format

revokedAt.description: Time when the token was revoked in RFC3339 format

tokenHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the bearer token (hex-encoded)

entries.description: Files and directories in current path

BearerAuth.description: Enter "Bearer <token>" where <token> is obtained from the /api/auth/pair/exchange endpoint
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
